title: WebFormChannelEnquiry
description: Inbound enquiry payload produced by the UC1 `web-form-channel` intake adapter from the broker firm's own structured web enquiry form. Validated at the intake port before the UC1 enquiry-qualification workflow accepts the enquiry. The form_version is preserved as provenance; the channel idempotency key is the form_submission_id minted by the adapter.

form_submission_id.description: Adapter-minted submission identifier; channel idempotency key.

form_version.description: Identifier of the form definition the submission was made against.

fields.description: Structured form field values keyed by field name.

notes.description: Free-text notes the customer added to the form.

source_referrer.description: Optional source referrer (search, partner site embed, etc.).
